dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9278 IH: To amend title 5, United States Code, to provide that judicial review under the Administrative Procedure Act requires de novo trial of the facts when agency action seeks a sanction.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Hageman introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To amend title 5, United States Code, to provide that judicial review under the Administrative Procedure Act requires de novo trial of the facts when agency action seeks a sanction.

section.header: De novo trial of facts when agency action seeks a sanction
section.text: Section 706 of title 5, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: in the matter preceding paragraph (1), by inserting after questions of law the following and questions of fact; and

in subparagraph (F), by striking to the extent and all that follows through by the reviewing court and inserting the following: , including the product of any rulemaking or adjudication conducted in accordance with the procedures required under section 553 or section 554.
